southneuhof
projectsclient work

Airwave

A macOS application that adds system-wide spatial audio to headphones using HRIR convolution. Built as a free, customizable alternative to proprietary spatial audio tools, because tools like these shouldn't cost a subscription.

Routes all system audio through a real-time convolution pipeline at ~0.1% CPU. Compatible with HeSuVi HRIR presets. Written in Swift.

landing-sveltekit

Reusable SvelteKit landing page engine primitives for landing page applications. Built to ship fast, modular marketing pages with enough design control for each product line.

Includes tuned layout grids, pre-configured SEO-friendly routing, and strict core vitals targets (100% Mobile/Desktop LCP). Mirrored and published directly from the core information system monorepo.

is-framework

Canonical monorepo framework for South Neuhof information system frontends. Standardized on pnpm workspaces, Vite, and Turbo, it carries the shared setup for Vue 3 and Expo mobile client applications.

Publishes shared model schemas, API contracts, and components under the @southneuhof scope. Supports source-first development with Vite HMR mappings and strict package boundary checks.

broader project parts:
is-vue-frameworkVue 3 primitives & layout engineis-data-modelShared schemas & API contractsutilitiesShared helpers & package boundariesapostleType-safe HTTP client wrapper

is-vue-framework

Vue 3 component library and composition primitives for South Neuhof frontends. Built on Vite and TypeScript to keep UI behavior consistent and client builds fast.

Includes design system tokens, responsive grid layouts, and custom hooks designed to run with zero layout shift on web targets.

View repository on GitHub →

is-data-model

Shared data validation schemas and enterprise API contract definitions. Keeps server responses aligned with clientside TypeScript interfaces.

Acts as the single source of truth for database models, protocol definitions, and DTO verification rules across microservices and client applications.

View repository on GitHub →

utilities

Core helper methods, monorepo package boundary checks, and compilation scripts. Standardizes linting, formatting, and build pipelines.

Holds shared algorithms, date-time calculation libraries, and execution pipeline config files used during development and builds.

View repository on GitHub →

apostle

A type-safe HTTP client wrapper and request lifecycle orchestration package. It is the shared network layer for South Neuhof frontends, published under the @southneuhof scope.

Handles retry logic, global authorization headers, and response payload validation helpers while keeping overhead low on mobile and browser targets.

View repository on GitHub →
